7:
A comfortable level of luck. A person becomes fortunate when they have earned it or asked for it. The reward comes quickly, provided the conditions for it have been created. You need to build everything on your own and not wait for something to fall from above. Having a single 7 means a person gains luck when they create the right conditions for it. In a past life, they lived righteously.
If, alongside the 7, there is also a "1" or "11" (karmic people), they yield before men, yet they possess heavenly luck.
If there are many sevens (77, 777, 7777) — these are self-assured people, sometimes brazen. They have great tasks before them and must use all the hints from the Almighty; they are happy and beloved by everyone. All sevens are outrageously lucky. Such a person senses others well, a psychologist by intuition, from birth.
 It is forbidden to engage in fraud or in unethical ways of acquiring money, because the law of the boomerang applies to such people very strongly.
77:
Luck always accompanies such people; they always find themselves in the right place at the right time and meet the right people. The 77 can pull a person into trouble and then immediately rescue them. Such a person emerges from any crisis situation with minimal losses.
Two sevens in the Psychomatrix mean that the person is a lucky one. They have the ability to take risks and set quite high goals for themselves, which they will be able to reach, because there is a very high probability that they will find precisely the direction that defines the potential hidden within them.
For someone bearing the mark of a lucky one, failures in life can be caused only by their own wrong behavior or thinking. Such people have no limit to their possibilities, no financial ceiling, and so on. It all comes down to their thinking, to what they allow themselves; they set the boundaries of their own life, and all of them exist only in their head. A lucky one in life, a darling of fate. Sometimes a person is given what they have not actually earned. This is given so that they can realize themselves more quickly. Luck is given in order to help other people and change the world for the better. It is essential to work on developing one's thinking — then everything will come to such people easily and quickly.
Such a person senses others well, a psychologist by intuition, from birth.
It is forbidden to engage in fraud or in unethical ways of acquiring money, because the law of the boomerang applies to such people very strongly.
Recommendations: One must be very careful with one's words and thoughts, because there is a danger of talking or thinking oneself into a bad life.
777:
Magi, wizards, and sorcerers — only in the modern world, if they can believe in themselves and their own powers. 777 and more means hyper-energy: brazen people who push straight ahead. They achieve everything and take it by sheer audacity.
A darling of fate, a powerful stream of opportunities.
People who possess such signs can be called engineers or architects of life. They themselves determine what will happen to them. Nature has marked them with a special sign; such a person builds their life around themselves BY THEMSELVES. All the failures of such people are their own mistakes or a lack of faith in their own powers. The main thing for such people is to find a use for their powers, to single out the field of applying their knowledge that is most interesting to them.
It is worth advising them not to reduce their goals and tasks to petty everyday problems: their possibilities extend beyond realistically imaginable boundaries, and there are no people or special commissions capable of giving a true assessment of their abilities. They themselves will be their only limitation; only laziness or a descent into oblivion (drunkenness, drugs) can prevent them from unlocking their possibilities. It adds the quality of courage to their character.
"777 and more" — everything will come to the person easily and simply. Planned matters are accomplished in the shortest time. Such a person senses others well, a psychologist by intuition, from birth. "777 and more" are engineers, designers of their own lives. But negative people, who always have many requests, are drawn toward such lucky ones in life.
Therefore, people with a great deal of luck need to learn to say "no," yet at the same time they must help those in need. Divine luck is given for self-realization, for achieving goals, and for good deeds — not for using one's talent solely and selfishly. "777 and more" grants a person the quality of courage and audacity. Likewise, 77–777 and more indicate a tendency toward alcohol, drugs, and gambling (usually with a weak character, more often in men).
 It is forbidden to engage in fraud or in unethical ways of acquiring money, because the law of the boomerang applies to such people very strongly.
 Therefore, people with a great deal of luck need to learn to say "no," yet at the same time they must help those in need.
Divine luck is given for self-realization, for achieving goals, and for good deeds — not for using one's talent solely and selfishly. "777 and more" grants a person the quality of courage and audacity. Likewise, 77–777 and more indicate a tendency toward alcohol, drugs, and gambling (usually with a weak character, more often in men). It is forbidden to engage in fraud or in unethical ways of acquiring money, because the law of the boomerang applies to such people very strongly.
One must be very careful with one's words and thoughts, because there is a danger of talking or thinking oneself into a bad life.
Recommendations: be sure to learn how to handle such a sector, to be ethical, and to use the opportunities that the Universe provides.

нет:
An empty luck sector has no effect on one's fortune; it governs the reaction to the stream of opportunities. The absence of digits indicates that one must not sit still. Provided the person manages to react to opportunities in time. Success will not fall from the sky for this person — they will need to put in effort, to see and seize opportunities. Such a person must achieve everything through their own labor; nothing is granted from above for free, and over the course of life they may become a strong, self-sufficient personality or blame those around them for their own mistakes. Unhappy people, often used by others; they always end up the guilty ones or the scapegoats, deprived in their personal life. They need to wear a tumar (protective amulet) and everything red.
Each day, read the Al-Fatiha or the Lord's Prayer. One should find a partner who has a 7. Karmic people — they attract problems to themselves. Recommendations (charity, prayer, spiritual practices).
Recommendations: for luck to accompany you, engage in charity (from the heart).
